summary: Iter23 verified: AdminProjectView read-first review page with sticky moderation panel is fully functional. Backend regression 14/14 pass. Frontend: admin clicks project card → lands on AdminProjectView (not editor), all public blocks + all 12 moderation controls present, mod-edit routes to /edit, editor hides publish/feature/archive, editor-save navigates back to view, editor-back-to-view link works, partner submissions inbox lands on view page, approve dialog updates moderation_status to Approved, save internal notes does not change status, rep flow intact and rep cannot access admin edit route.
critical_code_review_comments: AdminProjectView.jsx conditionally renders admin-view-applications and admin-view-history only when arrays are non-empty — reviewer confirmed this is intended (same as section-concept/objectives collapse behaviour).
AdminProjectView.jsx is 300 lines — within acceptable limits.
Backend test file references REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from env; pytest.ini could load it automatically for CI convenience (currently must be exported before running).
seed_data_creation: None — used existing seeded project e19930ac-a082-4a56-9b17-9608b0708d92. Approve action changed moderation_status from 'Submitted for review' to 'Approved' during test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter23 confirmed. Backend regression file: backend/tests/test_project_editor_unified.py (14 tests). Note: run with REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL exported (BASE_URL is empty otherwise). AdminProjectView at /admin/tv-projects/{id}, editor at /admin/tv-projects/{id}/edit. Approve dialog flow verified. Test project e19930ac is now Approved+published — subsequent iterations may want to reset if they need a pending state.
